sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available in sources

special_mechanics.name: jumping
special_mechanics.description: Player character can jump as an exploratory action

special_mechanics.name: swimming
special_mechanics.description: Player character can swim as an exploratory action

special_mechanics.name: inclined_surface_traversal
special_mechanics.description: Player and NPCs can walk up inclined surfaces (slopes)

special_mechanics.name: item_physics
special_mechanics.description: Physics system allows items to bounce when thrown against surfaces

special_mechanics.name: vertical_camera
special_mechanics.description: Player can look up and down in the 3D environment

special_mechanics.name: flight
special_mechanics.description: Flight spell available as magical spell effect

tier_notes: Tier 2 empirical/qualitative data. Wikipedia source contains gameplay descriptions but no quantified movement parameters, physics values, or sub-pixel system information. Game mechanics are documented qualitatively (jumping, swimming, slope traversal, item physics) but precise values are not provided in available documentation.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Ultima Underworld: The Stygian Abyss (Gameplay section)
